title: Sambro International Limited CyP Brands-Spidey Plaster Figure, Creative Activities, Paint, Multicoloured, Official Product
features: SPIDEY Spidey Plaster Figure to Paint
FEATURES: Enjoy painting and decorating your Spidey plaster figure with this complete pack that contains a figure, 5 bottles of paints of different colors and a brush

QUALITY PRODUCT: Designed in Spain following all manufacturing processes and quality in accordance with European regulations. We use high quality and durable materials in all our products putting great effort into creating special designs for you
BRAND: This licensed product is official and 100% original

CYP BRANDS: Quality, design and commitment are our strengths. Specialized for more than 30 years in the creation, manufacture and distribution of licensed products in the categories of school supplies, stationery, gift, toy and pet supplies. Our mission is to transfer the values of our brands to our products to fill homes around the world with happiness.
